title: Copy and adapt post-review components from FO-12
description: Copy from FO-12, adapt for FO-13: (1) step-background.tsx → step-theme.tsx with new framing text, (2) step-notifications.tsx — copy as-is, (3) step-paywall.tsx → step-premium.tsx — copy as-is, (4) step-completion.tsx → step-feed.tsx — adapted: 'Welcome to your personal affirmation feed' text, no confetti. All components get FO-13 step numbers.
